Finding Dory (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $486,295,561Details
International Box Office $538,710,564
Worldwide Box Office $1,025,006,125
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $37,760,513
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $60,374,080
Total $98,134,593
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Reunites the friendly-but-forgetful blue tang fish with her loved ones, and everyone learns a few things about the true meaning of family along the way.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$135,060,273 (27.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,305 opening theaters/4,305 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $672,380,914

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 17th, 2016 (Wide) by Walt Disney
June 17th, 2016 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 16th, 2016 (Wide) (China)
June 16th, 2016 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
June 16th, 2016 (Wide) (Slovakia)
June 17th, 2016 (Wide) (Australia)
June 17th, 2016 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: October 25th, 2016 by Disney Pixar
MPA Rating: PG for mild thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2424 (Cert #50325), 5/11/2016)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Franchise: Finding Nemo
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Gratuitous Cameos, Legacy Sequel, Scene in End Credits, Sequel With Lead Character Recast, Slow Motion Scene, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): Emeryville, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (production facility): Pixar Animation Studios, Emeryville, CA
Filming location (state or county): Alameda County, CA, California, United States
Geographical setting: California
Plot point: Escape, Faulty Memory, Non-Chronological, Talking Animals, Underwater
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Disney-Pixar
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Reunites the friendly-but-forgetful blue tang fish with her loved ones, and everyone learns a few things about the true meaning of family along the way.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$135,060,273 (27.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,305 opening theaters/4,305 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $672,380,914
